video_gen.model: Kling V3 Pro via fal.ai (primary), Kling direct (fallback)
video_gen.invocationPattern: generateImageToVideo() for Tier 2-4, generateOmniVideo() for Tier 1 dialogue panels
video_gen.actualResult: ZERO video_clip assets in DB — all 21 calls failed silently
video_gen.failureMode: Errors caught in try/catch, logged but pipeline continues. No video clips persisted.
video_gen.evidenceQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_assets WHERE pipelineRunId=120003 AND assetType='video_clip' → 0 rows
video_gen.rootCause: fal.ai Kling calls likely timed out or returned errors; pipeline error handling swallows failures and marks node 'complete' based on progress counter, not actual asset count

voice_gen.invocationPattern: textToSpeech({ voiceId, text, modelId: MODELS.MULTILINGUAL_V2, voiceSettings: VOICE_PRESETS.heroic })
voice_gen.actualResult: 8 voice clips generated and stored successfully
voice_gen.issue: All 8 clips use same voiceId (Roger) regardless of character (Mira vs Master Gen). No character-voice mapping.

lip_sync.skipReason: enableLipSync defaults to false in assembly settings. Also: no video_clip assets exist to lip-sync against.

music_gen.invocationPattern: generateSceneBGM({ sceneDescription, mood }) → generateMusic({ prompt, instrumental: true })
music_gen.input: anime episode background score for 'First Light', orchestral, cinematic + mood
music_gen.actualResult: File stored but CORRUPTED — only 1KB (should be 500KB-2MB for 30-60s track)
music_gen.failureMode: MiniMax API returned a URL that resolves to a 1KB file. No validation of file size before storage.
music_gen.rootCause: MiniMax free tier likely returned an error page or empty placeholder instead of actual audio. No size/duration validation after download.

foley_gen.invocationPattern: foleyGenNode() → LLM cue extraction → generateMusic() per cue
foley_gen.skipReason: enableFoley defaults to false in assembly settings

ambient_gen.invocationPattern: ambientGenNode() → LLM scene detection → generateMusic() per scene
ambient_gen.skipReason: enableAmbient defaults to false in assembly settings

assembly.invocationPattern: assembleVideo() → ffmpeg concat with xfade transitions
assembly.actualResult: Only thumbnail generated — no video clips available to assemble
assembly.failureMode: Assembly ran but found 0 video_clip assets. Generated a thumbnail from panel keyframe instead of failing.
assembly.evidenceQuery: SELECT assetType FROM pipeline_assets WHERE pipelineRunId=120003 → voice_clip(8), music_segment(1), thumbnail(1). No video_clip.
assembly.rootCause: Assembly node's error path generates a thumbnail fallback when no video clips exist, then marks itself 'complete'. This masks the upstream video_gen failure.

adapterComposerPipeline.purpose: Wires AdapterComposer (StoryMaker, StoryDiffusion, Mitsua) into D0/D1.5/D7 generation stages
adapterComposerPipeline.status: ORPHANED — not imported or called from pipelineOrchestrator.ts
adapterComposerPipeline.impact: Character identity preservation (StoryMaker), style consistency (Mitsua), and multi-view generation are all dead code in the production pipeline

d0CharacterDesigner.purpose: Two-pass multi-view character sheet generation with StoryMaker identity preservation
d0CharacterDesigner.status: BENCHMARK ONLY — never called from production pipeline
d0CharacterDesigner.impact: Character reference sheets generated by smoke test used generic Forge ImageService, not the D0 designer

hitlGateSystem.purpose: Human-in-the-loop quality gates at 10 pipeline stages
hitlGateSystem.status: PARTIALLY WIRED — initializeHitlForRun is called but gates are never checked during pipeline execution because processPreFlightStages returns immediately when no gate_configs exist
hitlGateSystem.impact: Quality gates exist in code but are effectively no-ops in the smoke test
